demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private home

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs just completely gave way again when I turned around, and I simply don't have the strength to push myself back up. I'm stuck here on the kitchen floor and I can't get up.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She's had a few of these falls over the last month, but this time she can't get herself off the floor at all and her neighbour found her down and called for help.

symptom_narrative.onset: fell a short time ago while turning quickly in the kitchen; this is the third time in about a month she has ended up on the ground
symptom_narrative.duration: on the floor since the fall and cannot get up on her own
symptom_narrative.character: her legs feel very weak, they 'give way', and she can't get any strength to push herself up; she's felt unsteady and slow on her feet for a few weeks
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she's frightened and stuck; she says she's terrified of falling and has barely moved around the house this past week because of it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: her legs, especially the thighs; her balance overall
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: recurrent over the past month, worse in the last week
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — she can't get up without help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: turning quickly and sudden movements throw her off balance

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: has had several falls over the past month and is unsteady on her feet
normally gets around with a walking stick but finds standing up from chairs hard

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a sleeping tablet the doctor started for her a few weeks ago
two tablets for her blood pressure
a few other regular tablets she takes each day

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, mobilises with a walking stick, neighbour checks on her; intense fear of falling has led her to restrict her activity at home over the past week

objective_data_offered.value: Neighbour says she is sitting on the kitchen floor, wide awake and talking normally, frightened but breathing comfortably and not clutching her chest.
On video she is on the floor and cannot push herself up to standing; she is not crying out in severe pain and can move both legs a little.
Neighbour reports she does not appear to have hit her head and did not black out — she remembers the whole thing.
The kitchen has dim lighting and several loose rugs on the floor; her walking stick is out of reach across the room.
